belt-driven-linear-axis.selected_topology_rationale: belt topology selected for linear-axis simplicity and catalog availability
belt-driven-linear-axis.derating_assumptions: duty-cycle derating applied to torque availability

ball-screw-linear-axis.selected_topology_rationale: ball-screw selected for precision/backlash-sensitive linear motion
ball-screw-linear-axis.derating_assumptions: continuous duty applies stronger thermal derating

direct-drive-rotary-axis.selected_topology_rationale: direct-drive selected for low backlash rotary motion
fallback_defaults_used: assumed rigid coupling to payload inertia
